description: Registry of all information flows, pipelines, and state transitions in the SRE system.

flows.name: Acquisition Planning Loop
flows.description: Core agent loop: analyze gaps, recommend next acquisition, execute, log outcome, recalibrate

steps.action: Load state (experiences + surface forms + audio index)
Compute state hash; skip if unchanged from last run
Tokenize all sentences and check each word against entity index and audio index
Classify gaps by type (ENTITY_INTEGRATION, AUDIO_ACQUISITION, JOINT_ACQUISITION)
Identify co-dependency clusters (sentences needing >1 word to resolve)
Build candidate list with coverage gain, completion bonus, cross-story reuse, cost
Structural planner: rank candidates by immediate coverage gain
Horizon planner: compute 2-step trajectories for top candidates
Probabilistic planner: apply calibrated confidence and outcome distributions
Select action and display recommendation
Execute acquisition (create entity + SF + contribution + download MP3)
Log prediction outcome to ledger
Recalibrate confidence and outcome distributions from updated ledger
Clear state hash for fresh analysis next invocation

state_transitions.intermediate: gap list, candidate list, 2-step plans, calibrated distributions

flows.name: Audio Resolution Chain
flows.description: Fallback chain for resolving a phrase/sentence to playable audio

steps.action: Direct native recording: check phrase_id -> AF_PHRASES[].audio_refs
Entity-level recording: entity_id -> SURFACE_FORMS[].pronunciation.audio_refs
Composed audio: PhraseComposer.resolve() concatenates approved atomic recordings
Atomic sequence: StoryAudioResolver.resolveSentence() tokenizes and looks up each word
Dictionary fallback: lookupAudio() in AUDIO_INDEX for remaining unmatched words
TTS fallback: speechSynthesis in the panel's language

flows.governance_gate: CONTRIBUTIONS.isRefPlayable() — only canonical contributions are playable

flows.name: Contribution Governance Pipeline
flows.description: Lifecycle of an audio asset from proposal to canonical integration

steps.action: Contribution proposed with source, speaker metadata, and proposed entity mapping
Validation: source URL confirmed, file integrity checked, metadata verified
Approval: entity_id and voice_type assigned; recording becomes playable for that profile
Canonical: permanent inclusion in the dataset; irreversible
Rejected at any stage; cannot proceed further

gate_conditions.pending->validated: Source URL accessible, file passes integrity check
gate_conditions.validated->approved: Human reviewer assigns entity mapping and voice type
gate_conditions.approved->canonical: Human sign-off; no further changes allowed
gate_conditions.any->rejected: Human reviewer rejects; record preserved for audit

flows.name: Voice Recording Workflow
flows.description: End-to-end flow for recording and contributing new voice audio

steps.action: Select language and voice type (male_adult/female_adult/male_child/female_child)
Generate recording queue from AudioCoverage for missing items
Record audio via browser MediaRecorder API
Playback, re-record if needed
Download bundle: YAML metadata + audio file
Submit as contribution record (future: direct integration)
Review workflow (Phase 2): approve/reject via reviewer

flows.name: Coverage Classification
flows.description: How the Requirement Matrix classifies each (entity x language x voice_type) tuple

steps.action: Collect all surface forms for a given language
For each voice type, check audio_refs for a matching voice_type tag
Has audio_ref with matching voice_type tag
Has audio_refs but none tagged for this voice type
No audio_refs at all

flows.name: Curriculum Rendering Flow
flows.description: How experiences are rendered in the dual-panel UI

steps.action: User selects curriculum (River World / Wife's Core 20)
User navigates to an experience (story)
App renders experience title, content, and entity word chips for both panels
Each panel shows the experience in its selected language
Entity chips link to word detail view with audio playback button
Audio playback resolved via audio-resolution-chain
Learner interactions logged as session events

flows.name: Build Pipeline
flows.description: Compile YAML source data into runtime JS bundles for the web app

steps.action: Download audio from Te Aka Māori Dictionary
Update surface_forms.yaml with audio refs and provenance
(Optional) Compile experiences to runtime graph
Regenerate JS bundles from YAML source
Copy bundles and audio to apps/river-world/ and docs/

flows.name: GitHub Pages Deployment
flows.description: Automated deploy transform: copies source to docs/ and rewrites paths for the GitHub Pages environment

steps.action: Run deploy-river-world.ps1
Copy app assets from apps/river-world/ to docs/
Copy shared packages from packages/language-data/ to docs/packages/language-data/
Copy voice-contrib from apps/voice-contrib/ to docs/voice-contrib/
Rewrite dev-relative paths (../../packages/) to deployment paths
Validate every referenced script asset exists on disk
Fail if any ../../packages/ paths remain in deployed HTML
GitHub Pages serves from docs/ directory
index.html loads runtime JS files from docs/ top-level
Additional package files loaded from docs/packages/language-data/
Audio files served from docs/voices/

validation.check: Every <script src="..."> resolves to an existing file in docs/

flows.note: SOURCE TREE ≠ DEPLOYMENT TREE. apps/river-world/ uses ../../packages/ (local dev). docs/ must use packages/ (site root relative). The deploy script enforces this transformation.
